title: HongBao: Red Envelope
description: A mod allows you to send red envelopes (also hongbao) to other players.
body:
This is a mod that allows you to send red envelopes.

Use `/hongbao common [count] [single]` to send a regular red envelope.

![common](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70e7cf07cab6d12d7e1f93e53e143c2567e4d616.png)

Use `/hongbao luck [count] [itemcount]` to send a lucky red envelope.

![luck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63d5027084d61967472fc77ce11ccd1aae639c2f.png)

Use `/hongbao spell [count] [words]` to send a password red envelope.

![spell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2fd31536b9df631b8296fc06964eece20f054bc.png)

Use `/hongbao query` to query red envelopes.

![query](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12883aaf05492c26eedef926dcc1a6deb4aec0c7.png)
